description: Ubuntu-based environment. Available tools: sh, bash, awk, sed, python3 (if included in the base image), and basic Unix utilities. Suitable for general-purpose tasks.

Bun JavaScript/TypeScript runtime environment. Use 'bun run <file>' to execute .ts, .js, or .mjs files. Do NOT use node, npm, or npx — use bun as the package manager and runtime instead. Available: bun, sh, bash, basic Unix utilities.

Python environment with uv package manager. Use 'uv run <file>' to execute Python files — this automatically manages dependencies. Do NOT use pip or virtualenv. Use 'uv add <package>' to declare dependencies in pyproject.toml. Available: uv, python3, sh, bash, basic Unix utilities.
